sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37998" key="e)pamblu/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπαμβλύνω</orth>, <sense id="n37998.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀμβλύνω</ref> </xr> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:3:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.38</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
